content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be navigating through the bottom of the loop heading toward the straight section.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 103, target = (103 + 5) % 120 = 108
- Waypoint 108: x=1.1252, y=1.5186
- Car: x=1.1150, y=1.4455
- Bearing = atan2(1.5186 - 1.4455, 1.1252 - 1.1150) = atan2(0.0731, 0.0102) ≈ 82.0°
- Current heading: -54.3°
- Delta = 82.0° - (-54.3°) = +136.3° → normalize: still very large positive
- Wait, let me reconsider — delta = 136.3° which is > 90°, meaning waypoint 108 is almost behind us now
- Try waypoint 109: x=1.1570, y=1.3717
- Bearing = atan2(1.3717 - 1.4455, 1.1570 - 1.1150) = atan2(-0.0738, 0.0420) ≈ -60.4°
- Delta = -60.4° - (-54.3°) = -6.1° → slightly right

The car has passed waypoint 108; target ahead is slightly right. Small right correction needed.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car has progressed past waypoint 108 and is now near waypoint 109; delta to next waypoint is about -6° (slightly right), so apply minimal right steering at moderate speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track loops sharply south then back northeast around waypoints 95-110",
    "Positive delta means steer left (positive steering_angle), negative means steer right",
    "Car heading has improved from -79° to -54° through the bottom turn",
    "After waypoint 108, track begins curving back northeast/north",
    "At delta < 10°, use smallest steering correction to avoid oscillation",
    "Progress at 86.8% — exiting tight bottom turn, can increase speed soon",
    "Waypoints 109-115 trend northeast then north along the left side",
    "Once delta near zero, go straight at 1.5 speed",
    "Watch for oversteer — heading improved rapidly, reduce steering now",
    "Car is right of center (is_left_of_center=false) — track straightening ahead"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.034, 1.062, 1.115],
    "y": [1.509, 1.484, 1.446],
    "yaw": [-61.0, -58.8, -54.3]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -6.1,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -5.0
}
```
